raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; box_1 cannot be lifted while box_2 is free to shift or peel. The left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent relative motion and reduce load on the attachment during separation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides with enough clearance for both claws to engage; box_2 is stabilized so the attachment does not cause box_1 to lift box_2 or bind during grasp.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped on both sides by the two claws and can be lifted in a controlled manner."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is firmly held by both claws and lifted slightly (minimal clearance above the table) so the attachment can be separated without box_1 scraping the table; there is free space on the tabletop to the side of the stacked boxes to move box_2 without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is broken/peeled by lateral shear, leaving box_1 free of box_2 while box_2 remains on or returns to the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is no longer attached to box_1; both claws maintain stable contact and there is vertical clearance above the table for lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (box_1) is picked up and fully supported by the robot, clear of the tabletop and any other objects."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; box_1 cannot be lifted while box_2 is free to shift or peel. The left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent relative motion and reduce load on the attachment during separation.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides with enough clearance for both claws to engage; box_2 is stabilized so the attachment does not cause box_1 to lift box_2 or bind during grasp.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped on both sides by the two claws and can be lifted in a controlled manner.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is firmly held by both claws and lifted slightly (minimal clearance above the table) so the attachment can be separated without box_1 scraping the table; there is free space on the tabletop to the side of the stacked boxes to move box_2 without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is broken/peeled by lateral shear, leaving box_1 free of box_2 while box_2 remains on or returns to the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is no longer attached to box_1; both claws maintain stable contact and there is vertical clearance above the table for lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (box_1) is picked up and fully supported by the robot, clear of the tabletop and any other objects.
